product_description: PebbleGo Next is a digital learning platform for grades 3-5 that empowers students to develop literacy skills and build knowledge in various subjects. It offers developmentally appropriate content, read-aloud audio, and multimodal tools, supporting independent learning for students of all abilities.

vendor_resources.justification: The product's main page highlights accessibility as a core design principle, stating it meets WCAG 2.2 Level AA, Section 508, and EN 301 549 standards.

other_resources.text: Web Accessibility Testing Checklist (Berkeley Public Schools)
other_resources.justification: A checklist from Berkeley Public Schools referencing a PebbleGo Next VPAT and detailing specific WCAG conformance results, including identified passes and fails.

other_resources.text: PebbleGo Next - Biographies and eBooks (SC Discus)
other_resources.justification: A resource description page from SC Discus stating PebbleGo Next is '508 & WCAG 2.0 Compliant'.

other_resources.text: K-3 Research Product PebbleGo Relaunches With Accessibility for Children With Disabilities (PR Newswire)
other_resources.justification: A news article announcing accessibility enhancements to PebbleGo (relevant to PebbleGo Next) including compliance with Section 508 and WCAG 2.1 AA.
